title: phaeneilema divergens
intro: Phaeneilema divergens, also known as the divergent phaenilema, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phaeneilema divergens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Phaeneilema divergens can be made by infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in a topical ointment or salve to treat skin conditions.
